title: ERROR 1194 (HY000): Table 't' is marked as crashed and should be repaired
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t (a TIMESTAMP NOT NULL, b INT DEFAULT NULL);
INSERT INTO t (a, b) VALUES (TIMESTAMP '2023-01-01 00:00:00', NULL);
SELECT * FROM t WHERE b IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Table marked as crashed after insert operation
